properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V1 V2 V4 V3 V5 V3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: You are forever in my life You see me through the seasons Cover me with Your hand And lead me in Your righteousness

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: And I look to You And I wait on You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'll sing to You Lord A hymn of Love For Your faithfulness to me I'm carried in everlasting arms You'll never let me go Through it all

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I'll sing to You Lord A hymn of Love For Your faithfulness to me I'm carried in everlasting arms You'll never let me go

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah
